conflict_log.key: El Puerto de Liverpool|Comprador de Visual Merchandising y Construcción|Cuajimalpa de Morelos, Mexico City, Mexico|https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/4441432493/|2026-07-16

processing_log.detail: Exactly six wrapper JSON inputs were not provided as separable validated envelopes; processed available JSON content and excluded L3-style content per instruction.
Applied brand-title-location-normalized-url-posted_date key and removed duplicates where applicable.
Applied priority and better-evidence rules without overwriting valid apply_url, fetch_status, source_name, or source_type.
Recorded explicit L1/L2 divergences in conflict_log.
Emitted consolidated schema with states only and no recommendations text.

data_quality_warnings.cause: The provided payload contained mixed wrapper outputs and partial/truncated JSON blocks rather than six cleanly separated validated wrapper JSON envelopes.
data_quality_warnings.impact: Normalization and source assignment required reconstruction from available content.
data_quality_warnings.message: Input was not delivered as six isolated wrapper JSON objects.
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: Re-submit the six wrapper outputs as distinct JSON envelopes to reduce ambiguity.

data_quality_warnings.cause: One or more content blocks behaved as L3/auxiliary material and were excluded from consolidation.
data_quality_warnings.impact: Excluded content did not affect final consolidated results.
data_quality_warnings.message: L3-style content was not included in output.
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: Keep auxiliary layers outside the consolidation payload.

data_quality_warnings.cause: At least one provided JSON block was truncated mid-object.
data_quality_warnings.impact: Some reroute and audit details could not be fully normalized.
data_quality_warnings.message: A partial JSON fragment was detected during consolidation.
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: Provide complete JSON blocks to prevent loss of metadata.

data_quality_warnings.cause: Multiple postings pointed to the same role family with slightly different source encodings.
data_quality_warnings.impact: Duplicate removal affected final item count.
data_quality_warnings.message: Canonical URL-based deduplication merged overlapping entries.
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: Preserve stable job IDs where available.
